name: Legacy Pero!
description:
Low quality! Uhh didn't mention the bulbs, just that he has the ability to go invisible. He also likes rocks.

"Pero is an extremely lightweight bird with exceptional flight abilities. As pero ages, they begin to develop glowing bulbs with help them enter an invisible state to hide from predators. Their large fluffy plumes help prevent bleeding, though they flee from fights!"- the old in game description for Pero. So, uhh, I may or may not have been playing Creatures Of Sonaria for the longest time, and I hate Pero's new design bro so uh, yeah. Decided to make this. Basically you're inside apartment or whatever, playing games, not specified what, but uh, yeah. Enjoy the over excited bird :)
creator: The_fog_is_coming
